zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Dinwoodie是James Dinwoodie的女兒，於大約1383年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾姆斯瓦爾德。她於1409年與Andrew Carruthers在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1415年之後在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Dinwoodie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dinwiddie
meanings: Scottish (Dumfriesshire): habitational name from Dinwoodie near Dumfries. The placename is first recorded in 1296 in the form Dinwithie, Dunwythye, and is probably named with British words that are ancestors of Welsh din ‘forest’ + gwydd ‘shrubs, bushes’.
History: Robert Dinwiddie, born in Glasgow in 1693, was lieutenant governor of VA from 1751 to 1758.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Dinwoodie was born about 1383, in Mouswald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of James Dinwoodie. She married Andrew Carruthers in 1409, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1415, in West Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Dinwoodieは約1383年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアモウスワルドでJames Dinwoodieの娘として生まれた。1409年にイギリススコットランドでAndrew Carruthersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1415年以後にイギリススコットランドウエスト ロスアンで死去した。

ko.Holmains Castle, Dalton, Dumfries and Ga: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 돌턴
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Dinwoodie(은)는 대략 1383년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 모우스월드에서 James Dinwoodie의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Andrew Carruthers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언에서 사망했다.

ru.Holmains Castle, Dalton, Dumfries and Ga: далтон, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Dinwoodie родилась около 1383 г. в местности мусвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её отца звали James Dinwoodie. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Carruthers в 1409 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1415 г. в местности вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.
